items.title: Error & Exception Handling
items.description: log.exception inside an except block records the traceback; logging and exception handling together make failures observable.

items.title: Modules & Imports
items.description: getLogger(__name__) relies on each module's name to produce a hierarchical, filterable logger tree.

items.title: os & pathlib
items.description: Log level and file destinations are often driven by environment variables (os.environ) and paths.
